Home / Services / Driveway Cleaning

Driveway Cleaning

Remove oil stains, dirt, and grime from your driveway and sidewalks.

A dirty driveway can significantly detract from your home's curb appeal. Our driveway cleaning service uses high-pressure power washing to remove stubborn oil stains, dirt, grime, and algae from concrete, brick, and paver driveways. We pre-treat heavily stained areas with a degreasing solution to ensure optimal results. Our powerful equipment and experienced technicians can restore your driveway to its original clean condition. We take care to protect surrounding landscaping and surfaces during the cleaning process.

Given the prevalence of ranch-style homes in areas like Orange Park, maintaining a clean driveway is key. We also offer sealing services to protect your driveway from future stains and damage. Sealing helps to prevent water penetration, which can lead to cracking and crumbling, especially during Jacksonville's occasional freezes.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Inspection of the driveway and identification of stained areas.
  2. 02 Step 2: Pre-treatment of heavily stained areas with a degreasing solution.
  3. 03 Step 3: High-pressure power washing to remove dirt, grime, and stains.
  4. 04 Step 4: Rinsing and final inspection.

Benefits

  • Improved curb appeal
  • Removal of stubborn stains
  • Prevention of future damage
  • Increased property value

Frequently Asked Questions

How effective is power washing for oil stains?

Power washing is highly effective for removing oil stains, especially when combined with a degreasing solution. We use professional-grade equipment and techniques to ensure optimal results.

Will power washing damage my driveway?

When done correctly, power washing will not damage your driveway. Our experienced technicians use the appropriate pressure and techniques for different types of surfaces to prevent damage.

Do you offer sealing services for driveways?

Yes, we offer sealing services to protect your driveway from future stains and damage. Sealing helps to prevent water penetration and prolong the life of your driveway.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with driveway cleaning? Contact us today.
